Day by Day

Your Itinerary

June 27 through July 2, 2026  ·  Destin, Florida

27
SaturdayJune

Arrival Day Travel

Note: Both families arrive in the evening — Rumph via DCA and Curry via Pittsburgh, both into VPS. Expect to be at the house by 8–8:30 PM. Keep it simple tonight.
  • ~7:00 PMArrive VPS — Rumph: Southwest Conf. B88DPX  ·  Curry: Frontier Flt #2754 (departs PIT 5:30 PM)
  • ~7:30 PMPick up Hertz Hyundai Santa Fe at VPS — Conf. L5680751771
  • ~8:00 PMCheck in to 255 Kono Way, Destin FL 32541 — unload, settle in, claim rooms
  • EveningQuick grocery run to stock the kitchen — Publix on Emerald Coast Pkwy. Order in or pick up fast food. Call it early — big week ahead.
28
SundayJune

Your Call — Choose Your Adventure

No fixed schedule — pick whatever fits the group's vibe.

Free · Kids Must-Do
Gator Beach at Fudpucker's

Hold, feed & photograph 100+ live gators with professional handlers. Completely free admission. 20001 Emerald Coast Pkwy.

Visit Site →
Free · Beachfront
James Lee Park

Hidden gem county park — playground right on the sand, quiet Gulf access, pavilions and showers. Best free beach in Destin.

Visit Site →
Dinner · Beachfront
The Back Porch

Destin's original beachfront seafood spot since 1974. Grouper, Apalachicola oysters, Gulf waves under your table. 1740 Scenic Hwy 98.

Visit Site →
Beach · Quieter Stretch
Henderson Beach State Park

Pristine Gulf beach with nature trails and picnic shelters. Less crowded than the strip, perfect for a relaxed day in the water.

Visit Site →
29
MondayJune

Crab Island Book in Advance Charter Payment Today

Heads up: $1,099.68 fishing charter balance auto-charges today to Amex ×1005. Confirm funds available.
25 Ft. Pontoon Boat Boogie's Watersports · 16 Harbor Blvd, Destin FL 32541 · HarborWalk Village
Confirmed · #350348248
Monday, June 29, 2026
9:30 AM
Half Day Rental
12 people max (all ages)
Dock behind the hut · Bring your ticket
HarborWalk Village · $20/vehicle
⚠ Arrive at least 1 hour early (8:30 AM) for traffic, parking & check-in. Look for the Boogie's sales booth on the Upper or Lower Level to the left of Margaritaville. All guests must sign waivers before check-in.
Manage Booking → Florida Boater's Safety Test →
  • Driver will need a Picture ID with birthdate and Boater's License if applicable
  • Hat with a chin strap (prevents it blowing off at speed)
  • Sunglasses & Sunscreen — apply before the trip starts
  • Swimwear & Towel
  • Cooler with food and drinks
  • Speakers
  • Water toys — Frisbees, floats, football, snorkel gear, etc. (vendors also sell these on Crab Island)
  • Small additional fee if bringing a pet
  • No restrooms on the boat or on Crab Island
  • Strap hat to chin before speeding up
  • Must be 18+ to operate/rent — operators must sign a liability waiver and receive training from Boogie's
  • If born on or after January 1, 1988 — a valid Florida or Nationally Recognized Boater's Safety Card is required. Take the test before arrival →
  • 12 people MAX per boat including children — no exceptions
  • All pontoons must return by sunset
  • Destin Harbor and Crab Island are No Wake Zones
  • No Grills on board
  • Driver must speak English — safety requirement
  • Marketing team may be present to photograph/video — let them know if you're not comfortable
  • Parking: HarborWalk Village parking — $20/vehicle, cash or credit. Can be limited during peak season — arrive early.
  • Check-In: Arrive 1 hour early (8:30 AM). Find the Boogie's Watersports sales booth on the Upper or Lower Level, left of Margaritaville.
  • Waivers: All guests must sign waivers before check-in. Unsigned waivers delay departure.
  • Departure: Go down the stairs behind the hut — dock attendant will get you set up. Bring your ticket.
  • Return: Boat must return to the same departure point by sunset.
  • 5-star review = 20% discount on your next Boogie's booking
Booking
#350348248
9:30 AM
June 29
Half Day
Pontoon

Crab Island — Plan Required

The iconic Destin sandbar experience — pontoon rental, crystal-clear water, floating vendors, sun. Book your pontoon boat or water taxi before you leave home. Summer Sundays sell out fast. Recommended: Boogie's Watersports.

  • 8:30 AMArrive Boogie's Watersports — 16 Harbor Blvd, HarborWalk Village. Booth left of Margaritaville. All guests sign waivers at check-in.
  • 9:30 AMPontoon departs — Boogie's Watersports Booking #350348248 · 25 ft. Half Day
  • All DayCrab Island — pack cooler, bring cash for floating vendors, water shoes recommended
  • EveningStroll Destin Harbor Boardwalk / HarborWalk Village — shops, ice cream, live music
  • DinnerAJ's Seafood & Oyster Bar on the harbor — deck over the water, live bands
30
TuesdayJune

Fishing Charter Day Confirmed #2069067

✦ Manage Booking on FishingBooker →

Charter Boat Outta Line — Captain Trey Windes

Meet: Destin Fishing Fleet Marina · 210 Harbor Blvd · Eastern Dock
Arrive by 12:30 PM  ·  Trip departs 1:00 PM  ·  Returns ~4:00 PM
Included: Rods, reels, live bait, tackle, fish cleaning, first mate, fishing license
Bring: Food, drinks, snacks, sunscreen, hat, motion sickness meds if needed
Tip: Budget 15–20% gratuity for the mate (~$189–252)

  • MorningBeach time or Big Kahuna's Water Park for a few hours before the afternoon charter
  • EveningVictory dinner at The Edge Seafood & SkyBar — rooftop harbor views, best spot to celebrate
1
WednesdayJuly

Last Full Day — Your Pick

Pack as much or as little as the group wants. These are all great — vote at breakfast.

Full Day · Water Park
Big Kahuna's Water Park

40+ water slides, lazy river, wave pool, go-karts and mini golf. Buy tickets online for discounts. 4052 Emerald Coast Pkwy.

Visit Site →
Relaxed · Rides & Shopping
Village of Baytowne Wharf

Outdoor village at Sandestin — carnival rides, zip line over the lagoon, boutiques, restaurants, and live music. Great laid-back last day.

Visit Site →
Fun · All Ages
The Track Fun Park

Multi-story go-karts, bumper boats, laser tag, mini golf, and big arcade. Great half-day — pair with a beach afternoon.

Visit Site →
Evening · Free to Walk
Destin Harbor Boardwalk

Last evening stroll at HarborWalk Village — shops, ice cream, sunset views, live entertainment. The perfect Destin send-off.

Visit Site →
Farewell dinner: The Edge SkyBar (rooftop, special occasion)  ·  Dewey Destin's (dock-to-table, most local)  ·  AJ's Seafood (lively harbor deck, live music). Then pack up and charge all devices.
2
ThursdayJuly

Departure Day Rumph: SW #4108 @ 6:05 PM Curry: Flt #3095 @ 5:49 PM

Checkout is midday — squeeze in one last taste of Destin before heading to VPS.

Morning · Peaceful
Last Gulf Sunrise

One final walk at Henderson Beach — shoes off, toes in the sand, coffee in hand. The best way to say goodbye.

Visit Site →
Morning · Kids
Last Splash at James Lee

Quick morning beach run at James Lee Park — let the kids burn off energy before the long travel day. Free, easy parking.

Visit Site →
Lunch · Local Favorite
Dewey Destin's Harborside

Grab a last Gulf seafood lunch before heading to the airport. Fresh catch, no pretense, dock-to-table local institution.

Visit Site →
Checkout checklist: Confirm checkout time with host · Leave keys per instructions · Return Hertz at VPS — confirm drop-off is July 2, not July 3 (call 1-800-654-3131)
  • By NoonAirbnb checkout — 255 Kono Way. Load the car, confirm keys per host instructions.
  • Early PMReturn Hertz at VPS Airport — 1701 Hwy 85 N. Allow time for a gas stop before returning.
  • 4:15 PMArrive VPS — check in, tag bags, clear security. Small airport, but don't cut it close with 8 people.
  • 6:05 PMSouthwest Flight #4108 departs VPS → Nashville BNA  ·  Boeing 737 MAX 8
  • ~8:20 PMArrive BNA Nashville  ·  Board connecting Flight #497 to DCA
  • 11:15 PMArrive DCA (Reagan National) · Conf. B88DPX · Vacation complete!
Where to Eat

Dining Guide

Fresh Gulf seafood, waterfront views & family favorites on the Emerald Coast

Waterfront · Family · Live Music · Our Top Pick
LuLu's on the Bay

Jimmy Buffett's sister Lucy's place on Choctawhatchee Bay — scratch-made coastal cuisine, tropical cocktails, live music every night, and a kids' play area on the sand. The perfect arrival-night welcome dinner with views over the water. 4607 Legendary Marina Dr · (850) 710-5858

Menu & Hours →
Beachside · Iconic Since 1982 · Live Gators
Fudpucker's Beachside Bar & Grill

A Destin institution. Famous for gator tail, fried Gulf seafood, and 100+ live alligators on-site you can feed and hold. Stay for dinner after Gator Beach — it's all in one spot. 20001 Emerald Coast Pkwy · (850) 654-4200

Visit Website →
Rooftop SkyBar · Over the Water · Special Occasion
The Edge Seafood & SkyBar

Built directly on the Destin Harbor water with rooftop SkyBar offering panoramic views. Gulf-to-table seafood, craft cocktails, live music 7 nights. The fishing charter victory dinner. 302 Harbor Blvd · (850) 659-3549

Reservations →
Beachfront · Casual · Destin Original Since 1974
The Back Porch Seafood & Oyster House

Destin's original beachfront restaurant — Gulf waves right below your table. Fresh grouper, Apalachicola oysters, cold drinks. As authentic and unpretentious as it gets. 1740 Scenic Hwy 98 · (850) 837-2022

View Menu →
Harbor Front · Raw Bar · Live Entertainment
AJ's Seafood & Oyster Bar

Multi-level entertainment complex right on the Destin Harbor — massive deck over the water, excellent raw bar, live bands most summer evenings. The loudest, liveliest spot on the harbor. 116 Harbor Blvd · (850) 837-1913

Visit Website →
Dock-to-Table · Local Institution · Freshest Catch
Dewey Destin's Harborside

Fresh catch bought directly from fishing boats docked out back — the most authentic, no-frills Gulf seafood experience in Destin. A local legend not on every tourist guide. 9 Calhoun Ave · (850) 837-7547

Visit Website →
Shore Excursions & Attractions

What to Do

Curated for two families — 4 adults & 4 kids ages 7–10

Crab Island
Sandbar · All Ages · June 28

Destin's legendary sandbar in Choctawhatchee Bay — pontoon rental, crystal water, floating vendors, water trampolines. Book in advance! Summer weekends sell out.

Book Pontoon →
Village of Baytowne Wharf
Sandestin · Rides · Shopping · Live Music

Outdoor village inside Sandestin with carnival rides, zip line across the lagoon, restaurants, boutiques, and weekly fireworks. Great mixed-age evening option.

Visit Website →
Destin Harbor Boardwalk
Free to Walk · All Ages · Evening

HarborWalk Village with restaurants, parasailing, dolphin cruises, jet ski rentals, live entertainment, and fireworks shows over the harbor. The heart of Destin.

Visit Website →
James Lee Park
Free Admission · Beachfront Playground

Okaloosa County's best-kept secret — FREE beachfront park with a fantastic playground right on the sand, pavilions, showers, and quieter Gulf access.

Park Info →
Gator Beach at Fudpucker's
Free Admission · Kids' Absolute Must-Do

Hold, feed & photograph real live alligators with professional handlers! 200+ gators, daily shows, VIP tours available. Open from 11 AM daily at Fudpucker's.

Visit Website →
Big Kahuna's Water Park
Water Park · Full Day · Ages 7+ Love It

40+ water slides, lazy river, wave pool, go-karts and mini golf. A complete full-day adventure. Buy tickets online for savings — opens Memorial Day weekend.

Book Tickets →
The Track Family Fun Park
Go-Karts · Bumper Boats · Arcade

Multi-story go-kart tracks, bumper boats, laser tag, mini golf, and a giant arcade — most attractions open to ages 7+. Great evening activity after a beach day.

Visit Website →
Henderson Beach State Park
Nature Trails · Uncrowded Beach

Pristine undeveloped coastline with dune hiking trails, native wildlife, and a quieter beach experience. Perfect for a morning walk before departure day.

Park Info →
